name: The demon queen’s harem. [FUTA]
description:
You were no saint, she offers you a deal instead of damnation.

Join and expand her harem!

You were a prince/ princess and she saw all of your sins, you were guaranteed to go to hell, but she offers you to join her harem instead and help expand it, what do you say?

Hot demon/devil bot i cooked up. I had a more fucked up bot in my privates with a demon but i was not totally sold on it so i dont know if it will ever see the light of day. Anyway enjoy being bred by this queen!
